positive: A stylized, minimalist graphic design featuring a majestic, stylized grizzly bear walking across a vast, abstract landscape of glowing lavender mountains and crystalline blue rivers. The bear should be depicted in strong, clean silhouette with intricate geometric patterns incorporated into its form and the surrounding nature elements. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and creamy off-white. The composition must be centered, suitable for a chest print, emphasizing clean lines and dramatic negative space. Art Deco and Polynesian tattoo inspired aesthetic, rendered with crisp vector precision, suitable for screen printing, isolated on a white background.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, logo, watermark, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, cartoon, photorealism, noisy
